{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603220902074D8D3F0F08633451151E\"}"},"total":373},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7041566411537482499","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超精彩。华夏拥有着无比强大的底蕴。中国历史上出现了无数超一流顶尖的名将。他们个有能力用小说的方式重现他们这个题材写的很好。毕竟他们都是曾经的英雄值得被铭记。","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":17,"text":"中国历史","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741413283451151E%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227041566411537482499%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227028221307711917093%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1639492443,"group_id":"7028221307711917093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是个逍遥游侠。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny7H7k6Ookd9+jtGQlYBBVc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/88dd3f6d65e44227900eaebfbde0021a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776704467\u0026x-signature=HlA%2FjD1ijyNZP%2FFWcSkxy8LHUxQ%3D","user_id":"85014005416","user_name":"傲天龙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"85014005416","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1697246802,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7028221307711917093","book_info":{"abstract":"【守国门+穿越古今+热血】平行世界，中土国文明出现断层，历史上的名将都被雪藏。封狼居胥的霍去病、七退匈奴的卫青、汉寿亭侯关云长、杀神白起、军神李靖、驱除鞑虏的岳武穆等等，曾经立下赫赫战功的名将，都被尘封。就在此时，名将神选将领，只有真正的铁血之国，才能在获得进化的资格。唐明穿越而来，孤身一人代表中土进入名将神选空间。“泱泱中土大国，定能人人如龙！”、“我要让这华夏名将，都重现人间！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c0f43210d87637ce0f0ed93dd3da397f","author":"王老板","author_id":"","book_id":"7028221307711917093","book_name":"国运：我能召唤华夏名将","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1527人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":262,\"name\":\"都市脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262\u0026name=都市脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":497,\"name\":\"武将\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=497\u0026name=武将\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":452,\"name\":\"架空\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452\u0026name=架空\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":496,\"name\":\"国运\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496\u0026name=国运\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7028221589925659149","read_count":"1527","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"366145"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"240","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,武将,架空,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/fabd7cceb0d5b7712fe0c22e723fc6c5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779325328\u0026x-signature=8rDJcZHxnkM6fF6%2BpaQUjVflgJU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4314112401350363","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.309331e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603220902074D8D3F0F08633451151E\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4946,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11255,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":20580},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1639495421,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7134570675938968335","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"以下个人观点！个人观点！个人观点！            写得很好，特别是描写主角和名将在战场上杀敌的情节。不过有点点瑕疵:一、主角召唤名将时候，会述说名将的功丰伟绩，但是说道名将在某场战争身死时，总会强行煽情，有点让人尴尬。二、主角介绍名将时候有点片面了，在说名将有多厉害时让人感觉有点拍马屁吧。还有对于战场外面的观众和国家描写少了，国家发现有这么多厉害的古人，肯定会让专家去调查呀，不过这方面貌似就出现了一次，然后后面就没有介绍进度如何。我觉得可以让系统介绍各国名将的丰功伟绩和个人品质等等，这样就不用主角介绍了，煽情的话可以播出名将誓死守卫国家的时候再放悲壮的bgm。就不用口头述说了，这样也不会说强行煽情了，也比较自然，后面主角吹彩虹屁也不会让人尴尬了\n以上只是个人观点和不成熟的建议，祝作者大大生活愉快、再创佳作[飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661146740,"group_id":"7028221307711917093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7OGCClxAk+9j9X0cBO9PAkO735CYCC78mOK6IX5GgUq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776702450\u0026x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"2409744211645284","user_name":"回山庄的三目神鸟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2409744211645284","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7028221307711917093","book_info":{"abstract":"【守国门+穿越古今+热血】平行世界，中土国文明出现断层，历史上的名将都被雪藏。封狼居胥的霍去病、七退匈奴的卫青、汉寿亭侯关云长、杀神白起、军神李靖、驱除鞑虏的岳武穆等等，曾经立下赫赫战功的名将，都被尘封。就在此时，名将神选将领，只有真正的铁血之国，才能在获得进化的资格。唐明穿越而来，孤身一人代表中土进入名将神选空间。“泱泱中土大国，定能人人如龙！”、“我要让这华夏名将，都重现人间！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c0f43210d87637ce0f0ed93dd3da397f","author":"王老板","author_id":"","book_id":"7028221307711917093","book_name":"国运：我能召唤华夏名将","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1527人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":262,\"name\":\"都市脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262\u0026name=都市脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"cat 致，就是战役方面略微有一丢丢可惜，没有写特别大场面的战争[思考]但不影响它好看[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687790072,"group_id":"7028221307711917093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随缘开文，随缘更新，为爱发电","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6skfcp3I/HSwtJH3e3G3clAO/RaZ6rhpR2uyGoL4QJC","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c6f7c9b214364758b841a14d8b905232~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776703029\u0026x-signature=ytFgkWRULwY3AiwtPRSvoH8JuDE%3D","user_id":"3188219716313915","user_name":"兔子爱吃黎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3188219716313915","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7028221307711917093","book_info":{"abstract":"【守国门+穿越古今+热血】平行世界，中土国文明出现断层，历史上的名将都被雪藏。封狼居胥的霍去病、七退匈奴的卫青、汉寿亭侯关云长、杀神白起、军神李靖、驱除鞑虏的岳武穆等等，曾经立下赫赫战功的名将，都被尘封。就在此时，名将神选将领，只有真正的铁血之国，才能在获得进化的资格。唐明穿越而来，孤身一人代表中土进入名将神选空间。“泱泱中土大国，定能人人如龙！”、“我要让这华夏名将，都重现人间！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c0f43210d87637ce0f0ed93dd3da397f","author":"王老板","author_id":"","book_id":"7028221307711917093","book_name":"国运：我能召唤华夏名将","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1527人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"
